title: Performance: auto-insert memory prefetch hints for FF-driven array reads

features.name: large unpacked array with FF-driven address read
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked array (exceeding L3 cache, e.g., >4MB) indexed by a flip-flop register, where both the FF update and array read occur in the same always @(posedge clk) block

features.name: registered address computation with hash function in clocked block
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clk) block where a register address is computed using bitwise operations (e.g., XOR, shift, mask) and then used to index a memory array in the same cycle

features.name: pipelined memory access pattern with cross-cycle address
features.description: Code should include a pipelined memory access pattern where the address is registered in one cycle and used to access memory in the next cycle, suitable for prefetch optimization
